message:
feat(assign,status,models,policy): extend multi-agent support and harden path/policy validation

Capability maps for new agent types:
- Add DefaultCapabilities entries for Cursor, Windsurf, Aider, and
  Ollama with task-type affinities tuned to each agent's strengths.
  Aider gets 0.95 for Bug/Feature (edit-focused), Ollama gets lower
  scores across the board (local model limitations), and Cursor/Windsurf
  get balanced profiles similar to Gemini.

Reservation path validation hardening:
- ExtractFilePaths: trim trailing slashes from directory paths before
  glob conversion, preventing double-slash in reservation patterns.
- isValidPath: reject domain-like strings (e.g. "github.com"), paths
  containing spaces, URLs with any scheme (not just http/https),
  version strings with v-prefix, and paths that are just "." or "..".
  Also exclude common TLDs (.com, .net, .io, etc.) that look like file
  extensions but aren't. This prevents false reservations on URLs and
  prose that happen to contain dots.

Model registry fix:
- Replace sync.Once-based sortedKeys cache with explicit
  rebuildSortedKeysLocked() called from ApplyOverrides(). The sync.Once
  approach broke when overrides were applied because resetting sync.Once
  is not safe, and the nil-check on sortedKeys could race. The new
  approach uses a proper RLock-upgrade-to-Lock pattern for lazy init
  in GetContextLimit().

Policy regex consolidation:
- Merge redundant blocked patterns: separate -f and --force patterns
  for git push consolidated into single regex with alternation.
- Merge git stash drop/clear into single pattern.
- Merge rm -rf patterns for /, ~, *, ., .. into single pattern.
- Add +refspec force push detection for git push.
- Add ToYAML() method on Policy for serialization.

Status patterns:
- Add Ollama prompt pattern and agent type to knownAgentTypes map
  and knownAgentPromptPrefixes regex.
- Use util.GetLastNLines() in error detection instead of manual
  Split+Join for the last-50-lines window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,54 @@ var DefaultCapabilities = map[tmux.AgentType]map[TaskType]float64{
 		TaskChore:         0.75,
 		TaskEpic:          0.75,
 	},
+	tmux.AgentCursor: {
+		TaskRefactor:      0.85,
+		TaskAnalysis:      0.85,
+		TaskDocs:          0.80,
+		TaskDocumentation: 0.80,
+		TaskBug:           0.85,
+		TaskFeature:       0.90,
+		TaskTesting:       0.85,
+		TaskTask:          0.85,
+		TaskChore:         0.80,
+		TaskEpic:          0.70,
+	},
+	tmux.AgentWindsurf: {
+		TaskRefactor:      0.85,
+		TaskAnalysis:      0.85,
+		TaskDocs:          0.80,
+		TaskDocumentation: 0.80,
+		TaskBug:           0.85,
+		TaskFeature:       0.90,
+		TaskTesting:       0.85,
+		TaskTask:          0.85,
+		TaskChore:         0.80,
+		TaskEpic:          0.70,
+	},
+	tmux.AgentAider: {
+		TaskRefactor:      0.80,
+		TaskAnalysis:      0.75,
+		TaskDocs:          0.70,
+		TaskDocumentation: 0.70,
+		TaskBug:           0.95, // Excellent at editing/fixing
+		TaskFeature:       0.95,
+		TaskTesting:       0.90,
+		TaskTask:          0.90,
+		TaskChore:         0.85,
+		TaskEpic:          0.60,
+	},
+	tmux.AgentOllama: {
+		TaskRefactor:      0.70,
+		TaskAnalysis:      0.75,
+		TaskDocs:          0.75,
+		TaskDocumentation: 0.75,
+		TaskBug:           0.70,
+		TaskFeature:       0.70,
+		TaskTesting:       0.70,
+		TaskTask:          0.75,
+		TaskChore:         0.70,
+		TaskEpic:          0.50,
+	},
 }
 
 // CapabilityMatrix manages agent capability scores with support for
@@ -196,6 +244,14 @@ func ParseAgentType(s string) tmux.AgentType {
 		return tmux.AgentCodex
 	case "gmi", "gemini":
 		return tmux.AgentGemini
+	case "cursor":
+		return tmux.AgentCursor
+	case "windsurf":
+		return tmux.AgentWindsurf
+	case "aider":
+		return tmux.AgentAider
+	case "ollama":
+		return tmux.AgentOllama
 	default:
 		return tmux.AgentType(s)
 	}
